papers.title_en: Modeling and Learning Multiple Hypotheses for Monocular 3D Object Detection
papers.tldr: 单目3D目标检测由于缺乏深度信息，本质上是一个具有高度多解性的病态问题。本文针对现有方法仅预测单一结果的局限性，提出了一种多假设建模与学习框架。该方法通过预测多个潜在的3D边界框来解释同一2D观测，有效捕捉了空间位置的不确定性，并在多个基准测试中证明了其在提升检测精度和鲁棒性方面的显著贡献。
papers.abstract_en: Detecting objects in 3D space using a monocular image is inherently a highly ill-posed problem: multiple plausible 3D bounding boxes can explain the same 2Dobservation of an object. Existing approaches typically follow a single-point …

papers.title_en: Object-Scene-Camera Decomposition and Recomposition for Data Efficient Monocular 3D Object Detection
papers.tldr: 针对单目3D目标检测对海量标注数据的依赖问题，本文提出了一种对象-场景-相机解耦与重组框架。该方法通过将图像中的目标、背景场景和相机内参进行分离，并重新组合生成多样化的训练样本，从而在数据受限的情况下显著提升模型的检测性能。这一方法不仅增强了模型对复杂视觉变化的鲁棒性，还为实现数据高效的3D感知提供了有效的技术路径。
papers.abstract_en: Monocular 3D object detection (M3OD) is intrinsically ill-posed, hence training a high-performance deep learning based M3OD model requires a humongous amount oflabeled data with complicated visual variation from diverse scenes, variety of objects …

papers.title_en: MonoDGD: Multi-scale Depth-Guided Fusion for Monocular 3D Object Detection
papers.tldr: 单目3D目标检测因深度估计的固有歧义性而面临巨大挑战。本文提出MonoDGD，一个端到端的深度引导融合框架。该方法通过多尺度深度引导融合机制，将深度预测信息与图像特征进行有效集成，旨在解决单目视觉中的深度不确定性问题。MonoDGD在保持检测效率的同时，显著提升了三维空间中的物体定位精度，为单目3D感知提供了更稳健的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Monocular 3D object detection remains a challenging ill-posed problem due to theinherent ambiguity in depth estimation. To address this fact, we propose MonoDGD(Monocular Depth-Guided Detection), an end-to-end framework that effectively …

papers.title_en: Towards Robust Incomplete Multimodal Open-set Domain Generalization with Uncertain Missing Modalities
papers.tldr: 本研究针对不完整多模态开放集领域泛化（IM-OSDG）问题，旨在解决在模态缺失且存在未知类别的情况下，如何使模型有效泛化至未见领域。现有方法往往忽视了模态缺失的不确定性。本文提出了一种鲁棒的框架，通过处理不确定的缺失模态，增强了模型对新领域和新类别的识别能力，在多模态学习和领域泛化领域做出了重要贡献。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Incomplete Multimodal Open-set Domain Generalization aims to enableeffective generalization to unseen domains and novel categories under incompletemodalities. Existing methods for open-set domain generalization often overlook …

papers.title_en: FrameGrapher: Frame-Augmented Vision-Language Models For Effective Video Understanding
papers.tldr: 针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在视频理解中面临的高昂训练和推理成本问题，本文提出了 FrameGrapher。该模型通过帧增强技术优化了视觉语言模型，旨在显著降低计算开销的同时，保持甚至提升视频理解的性能。FrameGrapher 为实现高效且精准的视频理解提供了一种新颖的架构方案，具有较强的实用价值。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs), such as Video-LLaMA, demonstratesuperior performance in video understanding tasks. Nonetheless, its significanttraining and inference costs hinder widespread adoption. To overcome this, existing …

papers.title_en: VISTA-3D: Training‑Free Unfolding for Vision-based 3D Object Detection
papers.tldr: VISTA-3D 针对自动驾驶和具身智能中的视觉 3D 目标检测任务，提出了一种无需训练的展开（unfolding）方法。该研究旨在解决传统深度学习模型在推理时计算和能耗过高的问题，通过引入神经形态（脉冲驱动）计算实现事件驱动的稀疏性。VISTA-3D 能够在不进行额外训练的情况下，将现有的视觉 3D 检测模型转化为更高效的架构，在保持检测精度的同时显著降低了计算开销。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract 3D object detection from vision inputs powers autonomous driving andembodied AI but remains compute-and energy-intensive at inference. Whileneuromorphic (spike-driven) computation promises event-driven sparsity and …

papers.title_en: Beyond Counting: Evaluating Abstract and Emotional Reasoning in Vision-Language Models
papers.tldr: 尽管视觉语言模型（VLM）发展迅速，但现有基准测试多集中于粗粒度识别或简单推理，忽视了高阶认知能力。本研究提出了一个全新的评估框架，旨在衡量VLM在抽象推理和情感理解等细粒度任务中的表现。通过深入分析，研究揭示了当前主流模型在处理复杂视觉语义时的局限性，为推动VLM向更高层次的智能演进提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Despite the rapid progress of Vision Language Models (VLMs), existing benchmarksstill concentrate on coarse-grained object recognition or simple relational reasoning,leaving the fine-grained and higher-order reasoning abilities of these systems largely …

papers.title_en: Dual-Modal Gated Fusion-Driven BEV 3D Object Detection: Enhancing Sustainable Intelligent Transportation in Nighttime Autonomous Driving
papers.tldr: 本研究针对夜间自动驾驶的感知难题，提出了一种双模态门控融合驱动的BEV 3D目标检测框架。该方法通过优化多模态数据的融合机制，有效提升了车辆在低光照环境下的环境理解能力。研究不仅提高了自动驾驶的安全性，还响应了可持续发展目标，为构建低碳、高效的城市智能交通系统提供了关键技术支撑。
papers.abstract_en: Autonomous driving technology is a core enabler for new energy vehicle industrialupgrading and a critical pillar for achieving sustainable development goals (SDGs),especially sustainable urban mobility, low-carbon transportation, and efficient …

papers.title_en: SELongVLM: Empowering Long Video Language Models with Self-Corrective Clip Selection
papers.tldr: SELongVLM 针对长视频理解中的连贯推理挑战，提出了一种自纠正片段选择机制。该方法通过优化关键视觉信息的提取，增强了多模态大模型处理超长视频序列的能力，在长视频问答和理解任务上取得了显著提升，为高效长视频建模提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Recent advances in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have enabledimpressive progress in visual–language reasoning, yet long-video understandingremains a formidable challenge due to the need for coherent reasoning over ultra …

papers.title_en: Empirical Recipes for Efficient and Compact Vision-Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对现有小型视觉语言模型（VLM）在资源受限环境下推理速度提升不明显的问题，通过实证研究提出了一套构建高效且紧凑型VLM的经验准则。文章深入分析了参数量与实际推理性能之间的差距，并探索了优化模型架构与训练流程的方法，旨在为低延迟、高吞吐量的部署场景提供更具实用价值的模型设计方案。
papers.abstract_en: Deploying vision-language models (VLMs) in resource-constrained settingsdemands low latency and high throughput, yet existing compact VLMs often fall shortof the inference speedups their smaller parameter counts suggest. To explain this …

papers.title_en: Uncertainty-Aware Cross-Modal Retrieval for Medical Report Generation
papers.tldr: 自动医疗报告生成（MRG）目前主要依赖单模态检索，限制了多模态语义的捕捉。本文提出了一种不确定性感知跨模态检索方法，旨在解决现有检索增强策略中的局限性。通过引入跨模态检索机制并结合不确定性建模，该方法能够更准确地捕捉图像与文本间的复杂关联，从而生成更高质量、更可靠的医疗报告，显著提升了MRG系统的性能。
papers.abstract_en: Automatic medical report generation (MRG) has advanced significantly with retrieval-augmented strategies. However, existing methods face two persistent challenges: 1)a largely reliance on single-modal retrieval, which limits multimodal semantic capture …

papers.title_en: TBDD: Three‐Branch Disease‐Driven Model for Medical Report Generation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对放射科医生工作负担重及报告生成中视觉与文本对齐难的问题，提出了TBDD（三分支疾病驱动模型）。该模型通过三个独立分支协同提取图像特征并结合疾病先验知识，旨在生成更准确的放射报告。实验表明，该方法在提升报告质量方面表现优异，有效减轻了人工编写压力，是医疗辅助诊断领域的重要进展。
papers.abstract_en: The automatic generation of radiology reports aims to produce accurate descriptionsof patients' radiographic images, thereby effectively reducing the workload ofradiologists. Although recent research has made notable progress, aligning visual …

papers.title_en: STFNet: A Spatial-Temporal Feature aggregation network for breast lesion segmentation in ultrasound videos
papers.tldr: 本研究针对乳腺癌早期诊断中超声视频病灶分割的挑战，提出了STFNet网络。传统方法多关注静态2D图像，忽略了超声检查中的时空上下文信息。STFNet通过聚合空间和时间特征，模拟超声医师的临床诊断过程，显著提升了视频序列中病灶分割的准确性和鲁棒性，为临床自动化诊断提供了有力支持。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate segmentation of lesions in ultrasound is critical for early detection anddiagnosis of breast cancer. Previous studies have mainly focused on static 2Dimages, ignoring the clinical scenarios in which sonographers make a diagnosis …

papers.title_en: TumorCLIP: Lightweight Vision-Language Fusion for Explainable MRI-Based Brain Tumor Classification
papers.tldr: 针对现有深度学习模型在脑肿瘤MRI分类中存在的解释性差和超参数敏感等问题，本文提出了TumorCLIP。这是一种轻量级的视觉-语言融合框架，通过结合医学影像特征与文本描述，实现了高效且可解释的肿瘤分类。该方法不仅降低了计算开销，还通过多模态对齐增强了模型的鲁棒性，为临床决策提供了更可靠的辅助。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate classification of brain tumors from MRI is critical for guiding clinical decision-making; however, existing deep learning models are often hindered by limitedinterpretability and pronounced sensitivity to hyperparameter selection, which …

papers.title_en: Comparative CT Ventricular Morphometrics in Hydrocephalus, Stroke, and Traumatic Brain Injury: A Distortion-Controlled Analysis
papers.tldr: 本研究针对脑积水、中风和创伤性脑损伤（TBI）中常见的脑室扩大现象，通过非增强CT影像进行对比形态学分析。研究采用失真控制技术，评估了不同神经系统疾病中脑室形态的差异，旨在为临床区分病理性脑积水与继发性脑室扩大提供定量依据，提升了急性神经系统疾病的诊断准确性。
papers.abstract_en: Background/Objectives: Ventricular enlargement is a common finding on non-contrast computed tomography (CT) in acute neurological presentations, occurring inhydrocephalus, stroke, and traumatic brain injury. This study evaluated whether …

papers.title_en: TBDD: Three‐Branch Disease‐Driven Model for Medical Report Generation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对放射科医生工作负担重及报告生成中视觉与文本对齐难的问题，提出了TBDD（三分支疾病驱动模型）。该模型通过三个独立分支协同提取图像特征并结合疾病先验知识，旨在生成更准确的放射报告。实验表明，该方法在提升报告质量方面表现优异，有效减轻了人工编写压力，是医疗辅助诊断领域的重要进展。
papers.abstract_en: The automatic generation of radiology reports aims to produce accurate descriptionsof patients' radiographic images, thereby effectively reducing the workload ofradiologists. Although recent research has made notable progress, aligning visual …

papers.title_en: Uncertainty-Aware Cross-Modal Retrieval for Medical Report Generation
papers.tldr: 自动医疗报告生成（MRG）目前主要依赖单模态检索，限制了多模态语义的捕捉。本文提出了一种不确定性感知跨模态检索方法，旨在解决现有检索增强策略中的局限性。通过引入跨模态检索机制并结合不确定性建模，该方法能够更准确地捕捉图像与文本间的复杂关联，从而生成更高质量、更可靠的医疗报告，显著提升了MRG系统的性能。
papers.abstract_en: Automatic medical report generation (MRG) has advanced significantly with retrieval-augmented strategies. However, existing methods face two persistent challenges: 1)a largely reliance on single-modal retrieval, which limits multimodal semantic capture …

papers.title_en: Enhancing 3D Medical Multi-Modal Large Language Models with Integrated Human Body Priors for Computed Tomography
papers.tldr: 本研究针对放射科医生短缺与CT影像需求激增的矛盾，提出了一种集成人体先验知识的3D医疗多模态大语言模型。该模型通过引入人体解剖结构等先验信息，显著增强了对复杂3D CT影像的理解与分析能力，旨在实现高效的自动化医疗影像诊断，有效缓解放射科的工作压力并提升诊断准确性。
papers.abstract_en: The exponential growth in computed tomography (CT), coupled with a stagnantnumber of radiologists, has created an urgent need for autonomous 3D medicalimage analysis to alleviate the increasing workload in radiology. While medical multi …

papers.title_en: Impact of CT dose on AI performance: A comparison of radiomics, deep, and foundation models in a multicentric anthropomorphic phantom study
papers.tldr: 本研究通过多中心人体模型实验，系统评估了CT辐射剂量对影像组学、深度学习及基础模型性能的影响。研究旨在揭示不同剂量水平导致的图像质量差异如何干预AI模型的预测准确性，为临床中平衡辐射防护与AI辅助诊断效能提供了重要参考，并对比了三类主流AI技术在不同剂量下的鲁棒性。
papers.abstract_en: Background Computed tomography (CT) is widely used in clinical practice due to itsability to provide detailed anatomical information. However, variations in radiationdose can affect image quality, potentially compromising the performance and …

papers.title_en: Transformer-based Fusion of Longitudinal Multimodal Radiomic Features from Chest Radiography and CT in COVID-19
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在评估Transformer架构在融合COVID-19患者纵向多模态影像特征（胸片和CT）方面的可行性。通过整合不同时间点的放射组学数据，该方法能够更准确地预测患者的临床预后并识别关键临床事件。研究展示了Transformer在处理复杂时序多模态医疗数据中的潜力，为新冠肺炎的精准诊疗提供了技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Purpose To evaluate the feasibility of a transformer structure for fusing longitudinalmultimodal radiomic features from chest radiographs (CXRs) and CT images topredict outcomes and identify associated clinical events in patients with COVID-19 …

papers.title_en: An explainable radiomics model based on multiparametric magnetic resonance for differentiating benign and malignant orbital tumors
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在开发并验证一种基于多参数磁共振成像（MRI）的可解释影像组学模型，用于鉴别眼眶肿瘤的良恶性。通过对来自两个中心的147例患者数据进行回顾性分析，研究构建了结合影像组学特征与临床指标的综合模型。该研究的主要贡献在于提供了一种无创且具有解释性的辅助诊断工具，显著提升了眼眶肿瘤术前鉴别的准确性，为临床决策提供了科学依据。
papers.abstract_en: Objective To develop and internally test a multiparametric radiomics combinedmodel for differentiating benign and malignant orbital tumors. Patients and MethodsThis retrospective study analyzed 147 patients from two centers (December 2014 to …

papers.title_en: MARE: Multimodal Analogical Reasoning for Disease Evolution-Aware Radiology Report Generation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对放射科报告生成中纵向医学数据利用不足的问题，提出了MARE框架。该框架通过多模态类比推理机制，捕捉疾病随时间演变的动态特征。相比于传统的特征融合方法，MARE能更精准地识别病灶变化，从而生成更具临床参考价值的演变感知型报告，显著提升了自动化诊断的准确性与临床实用性。
papers.abstract_en: Radiology report generation from longitudinal medical data is critical for assessingdisease progression and automating diagnostic workflows. While recent methodsincorporate longitudinal information, they primarily rely on multimodal feature fusion …
